zh.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 英國戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Wadham於1382年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield38歲，母親Joan de Wrottesley32歲。她於大約1430年與John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年11月25日之後在英國。

zh-hans.Yeovil, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特也奧維爾
zh-hans.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 英国戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Wadham于1382年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield38岁，母亲Joan de Wrottesley32岁。她于大约1430年与John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年11月25日之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Wadham was born in 1382, in Somerset, England, her father, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, was 38 and her mother, Joan de Wrottesley, was 32. She married John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton about 1430, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 25 November 1462, in England.

fr.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Wadham est née en 1382, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wrottesley, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton environ 1430, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 25 novembre 1462, à Angleterre.

de.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Wadham 1382 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield 38 und ihre Mutter Joan de Wrottesley 32. Sie hat um 1430 in England John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 25. November 1462 in England.

Lei sposato John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton circa 1430, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 25 novembre 1462, nel England.

ko.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Wadham(이)가 1382년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Wrottesley(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 영국에서 John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 11월 25일 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Wadham nasceu em 1382, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Wrottesley, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton aproximadamente 1430, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 25 de novembro de 1462, em Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Wadham родилась в 1382 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wrottesley, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton около 1430 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 25 ноябрь 1462 г. в местности Англия.

Se casó con John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton aproximadamente 1430, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 25 de noviembre de 1462, en Inglaterra.
